channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Falx to Sword
item.description: The barbaric Falx not your liking? Take this Arming Sword instead.

item.title: Falx To Warhammer
item.description: Turns your trusty Falx into an even trustier Warhammer. Smash your enemies rusty bones!

item.title: JSCM Frozen Struggles
item.description: A new modpack for my girlfriend and I. Focused around a Sub-Artic playthrough

item.title: Cozy Pierzynas
item.description: Adds new uses for feathers. Pillows and duvets in many colors.

item.title: FasterSteel
item.description: Makes blister steel production faster by reducing the heat hours needed. Configurable.

item.title: Dumbwaiter
item.description: A medieval-style lift for moving between vertically-separated floors. Now with labels.

item.title: RKN Generic Crafting
item.description: Generic gridless crafting system that completely replaces all UI grid recipes

item.title: Extreme Weathers [ALPHA]
item.description: Introduces new weather mechanics using the vanilla weather system.

item.title: WeatherStory
item.description: dynamic/stateful climate system based on chunk/region-derived wind, humidity, temperature, pressure

item.title: race addition
item.description: adds a race to my server

item.title: Forgotten Armory: Chinese Dynasties
item.description: Mod adding multiple iron+ Scale armor variations in the style of Chinese Dynasties

item.title: Bear's Shifty Earth
item.description: Overhauls soil instability to make it more engaging, sensible, and configurable.

item.title: Sundered Isles Custom Models
item.description: Custom blocks and items made for the Sundered Isles Server.

item.title: Meliora Meadows Adjustments
item.description: Adjusts A LOT of mods, applying Aldi's Classes trait restrictions and disabling some jsons.

item.title: Rot from containers
item.description: Allows rot to be extracted from containers through a crafting grid.

item.title: Electrical Progressive: Basics No Gen
item.description: Basic electrical devices... but without the Generators.

item.title: C4B Traducciones-ES ► MODS
item.description: Paquete de Traducciones de Mods en Español-ES

item.title: Freshness Overlay
item.description: Shows freshness of food and hides.

item.title: Safe Fluid Cooking
item.description: No more lost liquids while cooking. You'll get burnt if you try.

item.title: Alegacy Quest Framework
item.description: Alegacy Quest Framework is a full-featured quest and boss combat engine for Vintage Story.

item.title: Alchemy
item.description: Potion mod that adds buffs to the player.

item.title: Coinage
item.description: Design and mint your own custom coins to trade with.

item.title: Legacy of the Phanerozoic: Shovel Mouth — Unofficial
item.description: Adds the family of hadrosauroids dinosaurs to Vintage Story. Unofficial compatibility port for Vinta

item.title: Legacy of the Phanerozoic: Sharp Tooth — Unofficial
item.description: Adds severals carcharodontosaurids to Vintage Story.

item.title: Legacy of the Phanerozoic: Scythe Claws — Unofficial
item.description: Adds the family of therizinosaurids dinosaurs to Vintage Story.

item.title: Legacy of the Phanerozoic: Sailed Spine — Unofficial
item.description: Adds severals spinosaurids to Vintage Story.

item.title: Legacy of the Phanerozoic: Plated Back — Unofficial
item.description: Adds the family of stegosaurian dinosaurs to Vintage Story.

item.title: Legacy of the Phanerozoic: Ocean Tyrant — Unofficial
item.description: Adds severals Mosasaurids to Vintage Story.

item.title: Legacy of the Phanerozoic: Long Neck — Unofficial
item.description: Adds the family of Macronarians dinosaurs to Vintage Story.

item.title: Legacy of the Phanerozoic: Horrible Hands — Unofficial
item.description: Adds the family of ornithomimosauria dinosaurs to Vintage Story.
